name: Alibaba Qwen API (DashScope)
what_it_does: Provides hosted access to Alibaba's Qwen2.5 series models (7B to 72B, including Qwen2.5-Coder and Qwen2.5-Math) via the DashScope API, with an OpenAI-compatible endpoint and strong multilingual and coding capabilities.
use_cases: Building multilingual agents that operate in Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Arabic, and other languages where Qwen2.5 outperforms Western-centric models
Code generation and debugging agents using Qwen2.5-Coder, which matches or exceeds GPT-4o on code benchmarks at lower cost
Mathematical reasoning pipelines using Qwen2.5-Math for structured STEM problem-solving
Cost-efficient production agents for Asian-market applications where Qwen's multilingual training provides better tokenization efficiency
Evaluating open-weight Qwen models via managed API before committing to self-hosted deployment
not_for: Applications where Alibaba Cloud data processing terms are incompatible with your data governance requirements
Teams without access to Alibaba Cloud account registration — full production access may require Chinese business registration for certain tiers
Workloads requiring data residency outside Alibaba Cloud regions
best_when: You need strong multilingual support (especially CJK languages) or best-in-class open-weight coding capabilities at competitive cost.
avoid_when: Your organization's data governance policy prohibits Alibaba Cloud data processing, or your users are exclusively English-speaking and other providers offer better English-language performance.

auth.notes: DashScope API key passed as Authorization: Bearer header. OpenAI-compatible endpoint at dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1 accepts the same key. Keys created in Alibaba Cloud RAM console.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial tokens on new DashScope account; quota varies by model and promotion
pricing.paid_tiers: Per million input/output tokens, significantly lower than US frontier providers for comparable models
pricing.notes: Pricing is competitive. Some promotional free quotas require Alibaba Cloud account in good standing. Chinese business registration may be required for higher-tier commercial access.

performance.rate_limits: Varies by model and account tier. Free tier: ~60 requests/min. Production tiers higher with quota increases via support.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: English documentation is available but lags Chinese documentation. Error messages are JSON-structured but some error codes require cross-referencing Chinese-language docs for full context.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Stateless inference. Deterministic with seed parameter.
known_agent_gotchas: OpenAI-compatible endpoint (dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1) and native DashScope endpoint have different parameter names — mixing them in the same codebase causes silent failures
English documentation is incomplete and behind the Chinese version — if an API feature appears missing, check Chinese docs at help.aliyun.com
Some Qwen model variants (Qwen-VL, Qwen-Audio) require the native DashScope SDK and do not work via the OpenAI-compatible endpoint
Rate limit errors return DashScope-specific error codes (e.g., 'Throttling.RateQuota') that existing OpenAI retry libraries do not recognize as retriable
Account registration for production quotas may require Alibaba Cloud real-name verification, adding lead time for non-Chinese entities

security_score_components.security_notes: Data processed on Alibaba Cloud infrastructure — review Alibaba Cloud data processing agreements before use with sensitive data. Standard TLS in transit.
